title: coelogyne panduriformis
intro: Coelogyne panduriformis, also known as the Spoon Orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Coelogyne panduriformis include the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are said to have a range of health benefits when consumed.
